project_context.name: EDITIONS FABS-CI ERP
project_context.slogan: Les livres sont des fenêtres par lesquelles on regarde le monde

design_system.vibe: Professional, premium, trustworthy, structured. NOT playful or marketing-y.

logos.description: 5 rounded squares arranged asymmetrically + text EDITIONS FABS-CI.
logos.svg_light_bg: <svg viewBox="0 0 250 50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="w-full h-full"><g transform="translate(0, 5)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#0A2540"/><rect x="16" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#FF6200"/><rect x="32" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#2E7D32"/><rect x="8" y="16" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#C62828"/><rect x="24" y="16" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#F5F5F5" stroke="#0A2540" strokeWidth="2"/></g><text x="60" y="28" fontFamily="Manrope, sans-serif" fontSize="22" fontWeight="800" fill="#0A2540" letterSpacing="-0.5">EDITIONS FABS-CI</text></svg>
logos.svg_dark_bg: <svg viewBox="0 0 250 50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="w-full h-full"><g transform="translate(0, 5)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#FFFFFF"/><rect x="16" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#FF6200"/><rect x="32" y="0" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#2E7D32"/><rect x="8" y="16" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="#C62828"/><rect x="24" y="16" width="12" height="12" rx="3" fill="transparent" stroke="#FFFFFF" strokeWidth="2"/></g><text x="60" y="28" fontFamily="Manrope, sans-serif" fontSize="22" fontWeight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" letterSpacing="-0.5">EDITIONS FABS-CI</text></svg>

login.card: bg-white shadow-xl rounded-2xl p-10 max-w-md w-full mx-auto relative z-10
login.logo_usage: Use svg_light_bg centered inside the white card at the top
login.cta: Emergent Google Auth Button. bg-[#FF6200] hover:bg-[#E65800] text-white w-full py-2.5 rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center gap-2
login.slogan: Text: 'Les livres sont des fenêtres par lesquelles on regarde le monde'. Placement: Absolute bottom of the screen (outside card), text-[#F5F5F5]/60, text-sm, centered.

sidebar.style: w-64 fixed h-screen bg-[#0A2540] text-white flex flex-col
sidebar.logo_usage: Use svg_dark_bg at the top of the sidebar

topbar.style: h-16 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 ml-64 px-6 flex items-center justify-between
topbar.content: School year (2026-2027) badge, User profile menu (DG: ALI MAMIN placeholder), Logout button

content.kpi_cards: Placeholders. bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-6 shadow-sm

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts (Manrope, IBM Plex Sans) via next/font or standard imports.
Implement EXACT hex codes provided. DO NOT alter the primary/accent colors.
Build the UI entirely in French.
Use 'FCFA' as the currency suffix in any financial placeholder data.
Use Shadcn UI for the dashboard components (cards, dropdowns) but style them to fit the strict B2B theme.
Ensure all interactive elements and major containers have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-google-btn').
